results.title: How to troubleshoot unavailable times that should be available | Calendly Help
results.content:
|  |  |  |
 --- 
| Code | What it means | How to fix it |
| DAILY MAX | You’ve hit the daily meeting limit for that event type. | Adjust limits under Limits and buffers in the event editor. |
| DURATION | Not enough time for your event. | Shorten the event or extend your availability. |
| MONTHLY MAX | You’ve hit the monthly meeting limit for that event type. | Adjust limits under Limits and buffers in the event editor. |
| RANGE | The date is outside your availability window. | Adjust the date range in the Availability section of your event type settings. |
| TOOSOON | The time is too soon based on your minimum notice rules. | Adjust your minimum scheduling notice. | [...] GROUP

Group event has max attendees.

Increase the max invitee number from the Meetings page.

OVERLAP

Another Calendly event is booked.

Reschedule from your Meetings page or enable Free/busy rules.

### Availability settings

These codes mean something in your general availability is blocking bookings, like a holiday or meeting limit.

|  |  |  |
 --- 
| Code | What it means | How to fix it |
| HOLIDAY | This date is marked as a holiday. | Edit holidays from your Availability page. |
| MEETING LIMIT | A meeting limit has been reached for this host. | The host must adjust the meeting limit in their own account. |

Code

What it means

How to fix it

HOLIDAY

This date is marked as a holiday.

Edit holidays from your Availability page.

MEETING LIMIT [...] |  |  |  |
 --- 
| Code | What it means | How to fix it |
| HOST | One or more hosts are unavailable for a Collective event type. | Make sure all hosts are free at the desired time. |
| ROUNDROBIN | No host is available based on the distribution rules. | Update Round Robin host availability or distribution settings. |
| UNFAIR | Scheduling at this time would distribute meetings unfairly between assigned hosts. | Adjust distribution settings for Round Robin events. |

Code

What it means

How to fix it

HOST

One or more hosts are unavailable for a Collective event type.

Make sure all hosts are free at the desired time.

ROUNDROBIN

No host is available based on the distribution rules.

Update Round Robin host availability or distribution settings.

UNFAIR

# How to Replace a Zipper Pull – No Tools or Sewing Needed!

### Fix a Broken Zipper Pull in Seconds with FixnZip

A broken zipper pull can make jackets, backpacks, tents, and luggage frustrating to use. Instead of replacing the entire zipper or struggling with makeshift fixes, the FixnZip Replacement Zipper Pull provides an easy, no-sew solution for zipper pull repair.

With no tools required, you can replace a missing or damaged zipper pull in seconds—restoring your zipper to full functionality without the hassle of sewing or repairs.

### Why Choose the FixnZip Replacement Zipper Pull? [...] ### Why Choose the FixnZip Replacement Zipper Pull?

🔹 No tools or sewing needed – Simply clip it on!  
🔹 Works on all types of zippers – Jackets, backpacks, tents, luggage, and more.  
🔹 Durable & stylish – Available in Black, Nickel, Graphite, and Dark Nickel.  
🔹 Saves time & money – No need to replace the entire zipper.

### How to Replace a Zipper Pull in 3 Easy Steps

### The Fastest Solution for Zipper Pull Repair

Whether you’re dealing with a broken jacket zipper, a worn-out backpack zipper, or a missing tent zipper pull, the FixnZip Replacement Zipper Pull is the fastest and easiest way to fix your zipper without replacing the entire thing.

Get yours now at FixnZip.com or find it on Amazon!
